title: Quarterly Results :: UiPath, Inc. (PATH)
text: UiPath investor relations quarterly results page provides comprehensive earnings reports and financial data. Accessible quarterly earnings releases for FY2024, FY2025, and FY2026 fiscal years. Each quarterly report includes: detailed financial statements, earnings press releases, presentation slides, and earnings call transcripts. Key metrics tracked across quarters: Revenue, ARR, net new ARR, GAAP and non-GAAP profitability, operating cash flow, adjusted free cash flow. FY2024 Performance: Full year revenue $1.308B (+24% YoY), achieved first GAAP profitability as public company. FY2025 Performance: Full year revenue $1.430B (+9% YoY), described as most innovative year with AI capability introductions. FY2026 Performance: Full year revenue $1.611B (+13% YoY), first full year of GAAP profitability with expanded non-GAAP margins. Historical trend: Consistent revenue growth, improving profitability, strong cash generation. ARR metrics show acceleration in larger customer cohorts adopting AI products. Investor relations page also includes: SEC filings (10-K, 10-Q), corporate governance information, investor presentations, earnings guidance updates.
